title: Photographer
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a full-time Photographer to join our creative production team. This role supports a wide range of projects including corporate communications, public-sector campaigns, events coverage, portraits, and visual storytelling across digital and print platforms. The Photographer will work closely with producers, designers, videographers, and account teams to deliver high-quality visual assets within tight timelines.

Key Responsibilities

Photography & Visual Production

  • Plan, shoot, and deliver high-quality photographs for a variety of assignments, including events, portraits, corporate shoots, campaigns, and documentary-style storytelling.

  • Translate creative briefs and communication objectives into compelling visual outcomes.

  • Ensure consistency in visual style, tone, and quality across all photography outputs.

Pre-Production & On-Site Execution

  • Conduct site recces, lighting tests, and equipment planning ahead of shoots.

  • Set up and manage lighting, cameras, and accessories independently on location or in studio.

  • Work professionally with clients, talents, and stakeholders during shoots, including senior leadership and public officials where required.

Post-Production

  • Perform photo selection, colour correction, retouching, and basic compositing where needed.

  • Deliver final assets in formats optimised for various platforms (social media, web, print, presentations).

  • Maintain proper file naming, archiving, and version control.

Collaboration & Workflow

  • Work closely with producers and account teams to meet project timelines and production schedules.

  • Collaborate with designers and videographers to ensure visual alignment across photography and video outputs.

  • Support fast-turnaround requests and time-sensitive projects when required.

Equipment & Asset Management

  • Take responsibility for photography equipment, including proper handling, maintenance, and storage.

  • Ensure equipment is signed out, returned, and accounted for according to internal processes.

  • Flag equipment issues, loss, or replacement needs promptly.

    Nice to Have

    • Experience working on public-sector, government, or corporate communications projects.

    • Basic videography or hybrid photo-video shooting experience.

    • Familiarity with social media content requirements and formats.

    • Experience working in fast-paced, project-based environments.

    What You’ll Be Working On

    • National and public-sector campaigns

    • Corporate and leadership portraits

    • Event and documentary coverage

    • Digital and social media content

    • Creative storytelling projects across multiple platforms

postedCompany.description:
We are EVOLV Communications Ltd., a Company Limited by Guarantee and set up by the Ministry of Communications and Information.
We are a separate entity from MCI and the Government.
postedCompany.name: EVOLV COMMUNICATIONS LTD.
